info.name: DJ Mark Stott, Ceroc Music Requests
info.description: Live event and track request system for Ceroc and Modern Jive dance events where DJ Mark Stott is performing.

list.name: list_ceroc_events
list.description: Fetches a real-time list of upcoming Ceroc dance freestyles and class nights where DJ Mark Stott is playing.

list.name: search_ceroc_tracks
list.description: Searches DJ Mark's library for dance-legal tracks (110-150 BPM). Use this to see if a song can be requested.
